flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ave Maria University fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (57.0% → 39.4%).

flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ave Maria University rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.6k → $30.2k).

flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Ave Maria University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (60.9% → 53.9%).
